completed_work: Added optional ContextPackManifest task_label and full_prompt_hash metadata.
Populated prompt telemetry in latest-context provider paths.
Verified with full pytest suite: 169 passed.
key_decisions: Keep task_label and full_prompt_hash optional for backward compatibility.
Do not change manifest_id computation; telemetry is audit metadata, not identity input.
next_actions: Start C ergonomics: add admission warning/cap telemetry for admit_with_warning context items.
risks: The prompt hash is audit metadata and must be interpreted against the exact prompt rendering path used by the script.
summary_text: AI-Lab implemented the B-min telemetry shim chosen by SYNCOMP-0006. ContextPackManifest gained optional task_label and full_prompt_hash fields. task_label is validated as lowercase kebab-case, full_prompt_hash as a 64-character lowercase SHA-256 digest, and both serialize only when present. prompt_context.py now provides context_task_slug and prompt_sha256 helpers and passes telemetry through latest-context manifest assembly. ask_provider.py and compare_providers.py now populate telemetry on latest-context paths; compare_providers.py saves the telemetry in sibling .context.json manifests. Tests were expanded for schema validation, serialization, builder passthrough, helper behavior, and provider wiring. The full suite passed with 169 tests.
